title: Concacity
description: Adds various content useful at some point
body:
# THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY ALPHA STAGE!

## BIG FEATURES are IN PROGRESS - NOT DISCONTINUED

Mod that adds some quality of life features that are useful at some point.
## Features
- No Elytra Durability (disabled durability while flying -> no worries about broken elytra)

### Planned
- Custom _programmable_ helper entities
- Elytra _rework_
- update to newer versions

## Dependencies
- owo lib

## Incompatible
- none

Not doing much yet, but also not tested with any mods. Feel free to report incompatibilities.

## Known Bugs / Issues
- Elytra Durability resets to 0 damage instead of staying where it is.

## Issues
Please use the issue tracker to report problems
